summary: Upgraded the CPU fallback atmosphere LUT system to a curved-path optical-depth solver with Rayleigh/Mie phase helpers, ozone band density, higher LUT resolutions, PNG debug exports, quality contract reports, and fixed atmosphere LUT state emission.
limitations: Runtime Playwright/WebGL diagnostics were not run in this sandbox.
R-0012 is still a CPU fallback/DataTexture solver, not the final production-grade precomputed atmosphere implementation.
Beauty tuning remains gated on local runtime shader diagnostics.
next: R-0013 should move toward GPU/precomputed atmosphere generation or tighter runtime visual calibration using the R-0012 LUT exports and runtime diagnostics.
